name: Eicher Motors Ltd / Royal Enfield
basis: Financials: Eicher Motors consolidated (exchange filings). Volumes: Royal Enfield motorcycles.

sources.primary: Royal Enfield volumes from Eicher Motors annual reports (FY17–FY25); financials from exchange filings (BSE/NSE).
sources.notes: Royal Enfield is 100% motorcycles (no scooters/mopeds/3W) and 100% ICE through FY25 (Flying Flea EV is FY26+). Domestic/export split disclosed in the ARs (wholesale/dispatch basis; FY25 total 10,05,340 = domestic 9,02,757 + export 1,02,583). Realisation-per-unit is intentionally NOT computed: revenue is Eicher consolidated (includes the VECV commercial-vehicle JV) while volume is Royal Enfield only, so the ratio would be meaningless. FY16 is a 15-month transition period and left null.

perFY.FY17: Eicher Motors Annual Report FY2016-17 (BSE filing, scripcode 505200; src/data/source-text/EICHER_2017.txt) — Royal Enfield motorcycle sales volume (Directors' Report / operational highlights); domestic + export reconciles to total. Parsed in data/raw-eicher-backfill.json.
perFY.FY18: Eicher Motors Annual Report FY2017-18 (BSE filing, scripcode 505200; src/data/source-text/EICHER_2018.txt) — Royal Enfield motorcycle sales volume (Directors' Report / operational highlights); domestic + export reconciles to total. Parsed in data/raw-eicher-backfill.json.

verification.method: Financials: Eicher Motors consolidated, from exchange filings (BSE/NSE). Volumes: Royal Enfield sales from Eicher annual reports FY17–FY25 (domestic + export reconciles to total). VECV excluded; FY16 (15-month transition) omitted.
verification.upgradePath: Engine-capacity (350cc vs 650cc) unit split is not disclosed in the ARs and would need SIAM / JATO.

notes.basis: Royal Enfield motorcycles (consolidated). VECV commercial vehicles excluded.
notes.ev: Royal Enfield had no electric model through FY25; powertrain mix is 100% ICE.
notes.sources: FY17–FY22 from Eicher annual reports (BSE); FY23–FY25 from RE sale-volume press releases (BSE/NSE), cross-checked with trade press.

na: 350cc vs 650cc volume split (not disclosed as RE-total units in the AR)
Royal Enfield standalone vs consolidated reconciliation (using consolidated)

statusLegend.available: Royal Enfield volume disclosed in the Eicher annual report (FY17–FY22) or RE sale-volume press release (FY23–FY25).
statusLegend.derived: Computed from disclosed figures (Domestic = Total − Export; volume growth = YoY of total RE units).
statusLegend.unavailable: Not separately disclosed for that FY.
statusLegend.paid_source_required: Engine-capacity (350cc vs 650cc) unit split needs SIAM / JATO — not in the annual report.
